title: Thermal Calibration
notes: Three hold anchors at 300/500/700°C plus a free cool-down to ambient. Run twice (empty + 50 kg load), identical schedule both times. Set Settings → Kiln load before each run; set fan mode to off. Feeds scripts/analyze-thermal.js — gives 3 fresh hold anchors per run and continuous cool-down dT/dt from 700°C to ambient. ~25-30 kWh per run.

segments.note: 700°C peak, then free cool-down to ambient
